ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "short_title" TEXT /* Short title of the study */,
  "full_title" TEXT /* Full title of the study */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the study was published */,
  "section" TEXT /* Publication section where the study is found */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* A brief summary of the study */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Key terms for easy search and categorization */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the study */,
  "peerReviewed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the study has been peer-reviewed */,
  "cave_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary cave the study focuses on */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main publication where the study is found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_cave_id FOREIGN KEY ("cave_id") REFERENCES caves ("cave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., university or organization) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* Open Researcher and Contributor ID for the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Brief description of the author's research interests */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "caves" (
  "cave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cave */,
  "cave_name" TEXT /* Name of the cave */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the cave */,
  "geological_feature" TEXT /* Geological features of the cave */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the cave */,
  "depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the cave in meters */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the cave in meters */,
  "discovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the cave was discovered */,
  "protection_status" TEXT /* Status of the cave's protection (e.g., protected, unprotected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cave_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_authors" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the author's contribution to the study */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order in which the author appears in the study (e.g., first author, second author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number for the publication */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the publication */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the publication */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page range of the study in the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the study category (e.g., Karst Studies, Cave Conservation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_category_links" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's research interests */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the study */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the study */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the study (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
